division_title: MOTOR CARRIERS OF PROPERTY PERMIT ACT
text: This division shall be known and may be cited as the Motor Carriers of Property Permit Act.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 14.85. MOTOR CARRIERS OF PROPERTY PERMIT ACT [34600 - 34672]
### Chapter 1. General Provisions and Definitions [34600 - 34605]
##### § 34600

This division shall be known and may be cited as the Motor Carriers of Property Permit Act.

*(Added by Stats. 1996, Ch. 1042, Sec. 53. Effective September 29, 1996.)*

subsections.text: This division shall be known and may be cited as the Motor Carriers of Property Permit Act.

history.raw: (Added by Stats. 1996, Ch. 1042, Sec. 53. Effective September 29, 1996.)
